notice.window_minimized: The window was minimized to the system tray.
notice.no_pairing_code: No pairing code is currently available.
notice.repair_started: A new pairing process has started.
notice.log_copy_failed: The log could not be copied
pairing.enter_code: Enter this code on the pairing page:
idle.message: Nothing to do – waiting for jobs.
status_code.pairing_expired_new_code: Code expired; creating a new code
status_code.pairing_rejected_new_code: Pairing rejected; creating a new code
settings.title: Settings
settings.local_changes_hint: Changes to the download folder and IRC identity are stored locally and applied immediately while the client is running.
settings.irc_hint: IRC networks, NickServ and SASL are managed in a separate dialog.
settings.irc_separate_hint: Manage IRC networks, NickServ, SASL, the default nick and automatic registration on the separate IRC page.
irc.title: IRC settings
irc.auto_register_if_required: Automatically register the nick when required
irc.reverse_dcc_hint: Only required for bots that use Reverse/Passive DCC. Forward the configured TCP port range through the router and firewall to this client's internal IP address.
irc.local_storage_hint: These IRC settings are stored locally only. Credentials are stored in irc-secrets.json, not client.json.
irc.local_only_hint: Networks and channels are imported from download jobs. Select an existing entry on the left and manage local NickServ and SASL credentials on the right. Leave password fields empty to keep existing credentials unchanged.
irc.no_networks: No IRC networks are available yet. They are added automatically when a download job for a new network arrives.
irc.no_credentials_for_network: No local credentials are stored for this network.
irc.no_credentials: No local IRC credentials are stored. Password fields are intentionally left empty; empty fields do not change existing credentials.
irc.data_privacy: This data is stored locally only and is never sent to autofetch. Passwords are stored in irc-secrets.json, not client.json.
irc.web_networks_hint: Networks and channels are imported automatically from download jobs. Select an existing entry here and manage only local NickServ/SASL credentials and global IRC options.
irc.reverse_dcc_web_hint: Some bots send files using Reverse DCC. Forward incoming TCP connections in the configured port range through your router to this device's local IP address. The client detects the public IP automatically; AUTOFETCH_DCC_PUBLIC_IP can override it when necessary.
repair.title: Pair client again?
repair.message:
The client will be disconnected from the current account and must then be paired again.

Local settings such as the download folder will be kept.
The server connection will be reset.

Do you want to continue?
web.title: autofetch status
web.irc_auth_required: This download requires a registered IRC nick.
flag.repair: Start pairing and discard the stored credentials for this client
flag.headless: Run without a graphical interface or system tray
flag.open_browser: Open the local status interface in a browser
flag.no_browser: Do not open the local status interface automatically
flag.webui_addr: Listen address for the local status interface
error.reverse_dcc_port_forward_required: The IRC bot could not reach this client for the Reverse DCC download. Forward the configured TCP port range through the router and firewall to this device.
error.reverse_dcc_port_forward_required_: The IRC bot could not reach this client on TCP port {{.Port}}. Forward the configured Reverse DCC port range through the router and firewall to this device.
error.reverse_dcc_disabled: The bot offered a Reverse DCC download, but Reverse DCC is disabled in the client. Enable it in the IRC settings and configure the required port forwarding.
error.client_not_paired: The client has not been paired yet.
error.client_revoked: The client was revoked or deleted by the server. Pair it again.
error.permission_denied: The client does not have sufficient permission for the selected path.
error.server_unreachable: The autofetch server cannot be reached. Check the network connection and server address.
error.connection_timeout: The connection timed out. Check the network connection and try again.
error.irc_registered_nick_required: This IRC download requires a registered nick. Add the NickServ or SASL credentials in the IRC settings.
error.sasl_auth_failed: SASL authentication with the IRC network failed. Check the username and password.
error.nickserv_identify_failed: NickServ authentication failed. Check the stored password.
error.xdcc_offer_timeout: The XDCC bot did not offer the download within the allowed time.
error.filename_mismatch: The offered filename does not match the expected download.
error.http_404: The download source was not found and can be checked again later.
error.client_shutdown: The download stopped because the client was shut down.
error.pairing_credentials_missing: The server approved pairing but did not return complete client credentials.
error.nickserv_handshake_timeout: Signing in to NickServ took too long.
error.irc_glined: The IRC network blocked this client connection. Check the technical log for details.
error.irc_join_failed: The client could not join the required IRC channel.
error.irc_connection_failed: The connection to the IRC network failed.
error.xdcc_transfer_incomplete: The XDCC transfer ended before the complete file was received.
error.invalid_download_instruction: The download job contains incomplete or invalid information.
error.unsupported_download_mode: This download type is not supported by the installed client version.
error.download_url_missing: The download job does not contain a download URL.
error.download_target_missing: The client could not determine a valid destination filename for the download.
error.http_download_failed_status: The download server responded with HTTP status {{.Status}}.
error.attempt_unavailable: The job is no longer active on the server.
error.server_url_missing: The autofetch server address is missing.
error.config_path_missing: The client configuration path is missing.
error.public_ip_detection_failed: The public IP address required for Reverse DCC could not be determined.
